name: SA document-harvest via free-host link (synthetic)
evidence:
Now hiring at Vumani Staffing Solutions.

To apply, please submit the following documents: your CV, a copy of your ID, your SARS letter and proof of banking.

Submit everything at https://careers-vumani.blogspot.com and wait for a call.
notes: Synthetic clone of the CV-harvest pattern. The apply link is on a free blog host (RDAP age would look old, so domain-age checks miss it) — the structural channel signal is what catches it. Demanding ID + SARS + banking proof up front is the credential red flag. Identifiers are fabricated.
